note: Every main chapter received a visual reader-effect job and a decision.
CH03, CH06, CH07, CH12, CH13, CH15, CH16, and CH24 have urgent reader-effect or fatigue gates.
CH02-CH05 need source/scene relief only if it improves narrative pull and provenance.
CH15-CH16 require pruning or substitution before final render assembly.
CH17 and CH21-CH24 need source texture, human stakes, or prose breathing room.
Shock, suspense, surprise, delight, clarity, and responsibility are the controlling visual jobs.
Reader addiction improves through better visual jobs and fewer slow figures, not through more exhibit count.
